summary: When Baro? is here! Discover Baro Ki'teer's inventory like never before.
changes: Added scroll-to-top behavior when filters change on Baro and All Items screens
Added Apply button to filter menu
Added Plat to ducat ratio in the market tab
Added ducat and credit sliders to filter menu
Added voting info window to new Baro visits
Fixed positioning of edit/delete menu for reviews
Fixed server being out of sync with warframe servers (thank you daylight savings...)
Fixed rare cases of incorrect mods appearing in Baro's inventory
